repo.description: Train latent diffusion for real-world super-resolution.

terms.context_snippet: This repo is used as an example for training and finetuning [latent-diffusion](https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion) used as the baseline in [StableSR](https://github.com/IceClear/StableSR).
